title: Automation Request - Copy item with subitems to a different board
excerpt:

posts.author: eshin922 (Ed Shin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve seen this mentioned on other posts but want to reiterate how important it is to have this functionality for my business.

We would like to be able to duplicate an item (with subitems) to another board. I understand you can create a copy and move the original but that messes up auto ID numbering and also creates a (copy) tag that has to be manually removed. Mirroring would work only if it supported subitems which it doesn’t. This seems like basic functionality that should be included.

Options:

  1. Create a duplicate copy of an item and move to another board with subitems included
  2. Update mirroring to support subitems

Thanks

posts.author: anagalvao (Ana Gubert Galvao)
posts.cookedHtml: This would also be very helpful to our organization!

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))

Hi @eshin922 ,

I totally understand your frustration about the lack of this functionality. So to help we just put together a detailed walkthrough on how to set this up in the community. You can check it out here: Copy item to a different board with subitems and updates and remove copy prefix

Let me know if that helps.
